metadata.title: Hotleno - Hotel Booking Platform
metadata.description: Find and book the perfect hotel for your next trip

homePage.heroTitle: Find the right stay for every journey
homePage.heroSubtitle: Search hotel options from trusted travel providers and plan your stay with confidence.

transfers.title: Airport transfers
transfers.description: Plan a smoother journey between the airport and your accommodation. Transfer options are being prepared for launch.

activities.title: Activities and experiences
activities.description: Discover tours and experiences that add more to your trip. Activity booking options are being prepared for launch.

destinations.title: Popular destinations
destinations.description: Explore inspiring cities and start a fresh hotel search for your travel dates.

why.title: Why plan with HOTLENO?
why.description: A clear booking experience designed around the essentials of your trip.

support.title: Helpful customer support
support.description: Get assistance with your account and booking journey when you need it.

simpleBooking.title: Simple booking journey
simpleBooking.description: Move from search to reservation through clear, focused steps.

secureExperience.title: Security-minded experience
secureExperience.description: Account and booking flows are built with careful handling of your information.

hotelOptions.title: Useful hotel options
hotelOptions.description: Compare available stays and choose what fits your plans.

inspiration.title: Stay inspiration
inspiration.description: Ideas to help you choose the setting and style of your next stay. Availability and prices appear after you search.

waterfront.title: Waterfront stays
waterfront.description: Hotels close to marinas, beaches, and lively promenades.

heritage.title: Heritage city stays
heritage.description: Places that keep you close to historic streets and cultural landmarks.

city.title: Modern city hotels
city.description: Practical stays near business districts, dining, and shopping.

central.title: Central neighborhood stays
central.description: Convenient options for exploring the city from a well-connected base.

footer.description: A hotel booking and travel services platform that brings trusted travel options together in one clear experience.
footer.needHelp: Need help? Visit the support center

about.title: About HOTLENO
about.description: HOTLENO helps travelers search for hotel availability and manage their bookings through a clear, multilingual experience.
about.notice: Hotel availability, prices, room details, and final booking conditions are supplied by participating hotels and travel providers and may change before confirmation.

whatWeDo.title: What we do
whatWeDo.body: We provide a digital platform for finding hotel options, reviewing available room rates, and managing booking requests. Our focus is to make travel planning easier to understand and manage.

howItWorks.title: How the platform works
howItWorks.body: Search results combine availability and booking information received from connected travel providers. Customers review the applicable room, price, guest, and cancellation details before submitting a booking.

providerAvailability.title: Hotel and provider availability
providerAvailability.body: HOTLENO does not own or operate the listed hotels. Availability, content, confirmation, and property services remain subject to the relevant hotel and travel provider.

customerCare.title: Customer care
customerCare.body: Registered customers can use the support center to ask about a booking, cancellation request, payment issue, or account. Support requests are tracked so the conversation remains available in the customer account.

responsibleInformation.title: Clear travel information
responsibleInformation.body: We aim to present supplier information accurately and without unsupported promises. Customers should review the final rate conditions, traveler information, and property policies shown during booking.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: Use the HOTLENO support center for booking, account, cancellation, and payment-related assistance.
contact.notice: For faster assistance, include the HOTLENO booking reference when your request relates to an existing booking. Do not include passwords or full payment card information in a support message.
contact.ctaDescription: Sign in to create a ticket and keep every response together in your account.

supportTickets.title: Support tickets
supportTickets.body: The support center is the primary contact channel available on HOTLENO. It allows signed-in customers to create a request, follow its status, and exchange messages with the support team.

bookingHelp.title: Booking assistance
bookingHelp.body: For an existing booking, provide the booking reference and a concise description of the issue. Hotel changes, cancellations, and refunds remain subject to the booked rate and provider conditions.

accountHelp.title: Account assistance
accountHelp.body: You can contact support for help with profile information, access to your bookings, saved travelers, or other account-related questions.

responseTimes.title: Responses and updates
responseTimes.body: Requests are reviewed according to their urgency and available information. Response times can vary when a hotel, payment processor, or travel provider must be contacted.

urgentIssues.title: Time-sensitive requests
urgentIssues.body: If your check-in is close, clearly state the travel date and booking reference in the subject and message. Creating duplicate tickets may slow the review of the same request.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: This policy explains the general types of information HOTLENO processes to provide accounts, bookings, and customer support.
privacy.notice: This policy describes HOTLENO's current platform practices in general terms. Specific processing may also depend on the hotel, travel provider, or payment service involved in a booking.

informationCollected.title: Information we collect
informationCollected.body: We may process account details, contact information, traveler information, booking records, support messages, and technical information needed to operate and protect the service.

informationUse.title: How information is used
informationUse.body: Information is used to provide account features, process booking requests, communicate booking updates, respond to support requests, maintain service security, and comply with applicable obligations.

informationSharing.title: When information is shared
informationSharing.body: Booking information may be shared with the relevant hotel, travel provider, payment service, or operational service provider when needed to complete or support the requested service. We do not publish traveler document details publicly.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.body: Records are retained for as long as reasonably needed for bookings, account support, security, dispute handling, and legal or operational requirements. Retention periods may differ by record type.

security.title: Security
security.body: We apply reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to protect platform information. No online service can guarantee absolute security, so customers should also protect their account credentials.

yourChoices.title: Your choices
yourChoices.body: Customers can review certain profile and booking information through their account and may contact support to request help with correcting or managing account information, subject to verification and applicable requirements.

cookies.title: Cookies and local preferences
cookies.body: The platform may use cookies or browser storage for essential sessions, language, currency display preferences, and other features needed for a consistent experience.

updates.title: Policy updates
updates.body: We may update this policy as the platform or applicable requirements change. The current version will remain available on this page.

terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.description: These terms describe the general rules for using HOTLENO and submitting hotel booking requests through the platform.
terms.notice: The rate rules, hotel policies, and provider conditions displayed for a specific booking form part of that booking. Review them before confirmation because they may be more specific than these general terms.

usingPlatform.title: Using HOTLENO
usingPlatform.body: You must provide accurate information and use the platform only for lawful travel-related purposes. You are responsible for activity performed through your account and for keeping your sign-in details secure.

bookingConfirmation.title: Booking confirmation
bookingConfirmation.body: Submitting a request does not guarantee a booking until the relevant confirmation is issued. Availability and rate conditions can change while a request is being processed.

pricesAndPayment.title: Prices and payment
pricesAndPayment.body: Prices are shown in the currency and format available for the booking. Included or excluded taxes, fees, and payment requirements should be reviewed in the booking summary and rate conditions before confirmation.

changesAndCancellation.title: Changes and cancellations
changesAndCancellation.body: Eligibility for a change, cancellation, or refund depends on the selected rate, hotel policy, provider rules, timing, and booking status. Some bookings are non-refundable or cannot be changed.

userResponsibilities.title: Traveler responsibilities
userResponsibilities.body: You are responsible for entering correct traveler names, contact details, dates, and any required document information. You must also check travel, entry, health, and identification requirements for the destination.

serviceAvailability.title: Service availability
serviceAvailability.body: We work to keep the platform available, but access may occasionally be interrupted by maintenance, provider systems, network conditions, or events outside our reasonable control.

liability.title: Hotels and third-party services
liability.body: Hotels and travel providers are responsible for delivering the accommodation or service they confirm. HOTLENO facilitates access to booking services and support but does not operate the properties.

updates.title: Updates to these terms
updates.body: These terms may be updated to reflect platform or regulatory changes. Continued use of the platform is subject to the version available at the time of use.

cancellationRefund.title: Cancellation and refund policy
cancellationRefund.description: This policy explains how cancellation requests and eligible refunds are handled for hotel bookings made through HOTLENO.
cancellationRefund.notice: The cancellation conditions displayed for the selected room and rate take priority. They may include deadlines, penalties, non-refundable terms, or hotel-specific restrictions.

rateConditions.title: Rate conditions
rateConditions.body: Each room rate can have different cancellation and amendment rules. Review the applicable conditions before booking, especially the cancellation deadline and any penalty amount.

requestingCancellation.title: Requesting a cancellation
requestingCancellation.body: Signed-in customers can request help from their booking page or the support center. A cancellation request is not complete until its status is confirmed by HOTLENO and, where required, the relevant provider.

supplierProcessing.title: Hotel and provider processing
supplierProcessing.body: Some cancellation requests must be sent to the hotel or travel provider. Processing time and final approval depend on their systems, rules, and the booking status.

refundEligibility.title: Refund eligibility
refundEligibility.body: A refund is available only when permitted by the rate conditions and confirmed cancellation outcome. Any applicable cancellation penalty or used portion of a service may be deducted.

nonRefundableBookings.title: Non-refundable bookings
nonRefundableBookings.body: A non-refundable booking may not qualify for a refund after confirmation. Exceptional requests can be reviewed, but approval is not guaranteed and remains subject to the hotel or provider.

refundTiming.title: Refund timing
refundTiming.body: Approved refunds may require additional processing time by the payment provider and the customer's financial institution. HOTLENO does not promise a fixed completion date when external processing is involved.

support.title: Getting help
support.body: If the displayed status is unclear or travel is approaching, create a support ticket and include the booking reference. The support team can review the internal booking and provider status.
